title: Serene Wild
description: Fixes snowlogging with Serene Seasons/Immersive Snow, and adds tags for Serene Seasons x Wilder Wild!
body:
A simple mod which adds support for [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)'s snowlogging feature to [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) and [Immersive Snow](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-snow)!

- Snowlogged blocks now generate in snowy biomes with both mods installed.
- Blocks will now be properly snowlogged during snowfall.
- Vegetation will convert into their snowy or original variants upon snowfall or melting.
- Snow now melts from snowlogged blocks.

That's all!
